synopsis:
Set after the fall of the Empire, Ahsoka follows the former Jedi knight Ahsoka Tano as she investigates an emerging threat to a vulnerable galaxy.
Episodes:
Ahsoka S01E01: Part One: Master and Apprentice
Ahsoka S01E02: Part Two: Toil and Trouble
Ahsoka S01E03: Part Three: Time to Fly
Ahsoka S01E04: Part Four: Fallen Jedi
Ahsoka S01E04: Part Four: Fallen Jedi
Ahsoka S01E05: Part Five: Shadow Warrior
Ahsoka S01E06: Part Six: Far, Far Away
Ahsoka S01E07: Part Seven: Dreams and Madness
Ahsoka S01E08: Part Eight: The Jedi, the Witch, and the Warlord
title: Ahsoka Season One
